gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/246)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/246)
text: مَنْ حَجَّ ثَلَاثَ سِنِينَ مُتَوَالِيَةً ثُمَّ حَجَّ أَوْ لَمْ يَحُجَّ فَهُوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ مُدْمِنِ الْحَجِّ
وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّ مُدْمِنَ الْحَجِّ الَّذِي إِذَا وَجَدَ الْحَجَّ حَجَّ كَمَا أَنَّ مُدْمِنَ الْخَمْرِ الَّذِي إِذَا وَجَدَهُ شَرِبَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Al Sandy Bin Al Rabi’e, from Muhammad Bin Al Qasim Bin Al Fuzayl, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘The one who perform Hajj for three years consecutively, then whether he performs Hajj (again) or does not perform Hajj (again), he would be at the status of the habitual performer of Hajj’.
And it is reported that the one habitual of the Hajj, the one who, when he finds (the money) for the Hajj, performs Hajj just as the one habitual of the wine, who, when he finds it, drinks it’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from al-Sindiy ibn al-Rabi’ from Muhammad ibn al-Qasim ibn al- Fudayl from Fudayl ibn Yasar who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, ‘If one performs al-Hajj during three consecutive years, he is considered as often performing al-Hajj. It is narrated that often performing al-Hajj is one who on finding the opportunity to perform al-Hajj performs it just as an alcoholic person drinks it whenever he finds.’”
